productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Magenta Sweatshirt
description: Composition Pink hooded V-neck sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves, stitch detailing on the closed placket and brand button above the hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery For the sassy fashionista, this sweatshirt from united colors of benetton has a covertly feminine appeal and understated pieces are the flavour of the moment. This sweatshirt with its simplistic cut and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatile style. Pair this with skinny jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
